main.content:
{{SF6-Version |version=[[Street Fighter 6/Version/1.02|1.02]] |gameversion=1.02 |date=September 27, 2023 |summary='''A.K.I. Release'''. Bug fixes with some minor changes due to bugs |links=[https://www.streetfighter.com/6/buckler/en/battle_change/20230927 Patch Notes] }} == A.K.I. Patch == * A.K.I. released
== '''Universal Changes''' == * '''Forward/Back Dash''' ** Input buffer window increased 4 → 7 frames (easier to get a dash with reversal timing) * '''{{clr|SA|Super Arts}}''' ** Input recognition window reduced to 9 frames between inputs (less likely to come out accidentally) * '''Drive Gain / Chip Damage vs. Burnout''' ** Several attacks unintentionally built less Drive gauge or did incorrect Chip damage when the opponent blocked while in Burnout and have been adjusted to the standard values * '''{{clr|DR|Drive Impact}}''' ** Fixed issue where a {{clr|DR|DI Clash}} would occur in specific situations after an attack was absorbed by armor (canceling each other out) ** e.g. a cancelable poke is absorbed on the first {{clr|DR|DI}} armor frame and immediately canceled into a {{clr|DR|counter-DI}} * '''Drive Parry''' ** Fixed issue where performing Parry from a crouching position would cost more Drive meter than from a standing position ** Also fixed issue where Dee Jay, E. Honda, Guile, Kimberly, Luke, Rashid, and Zangief would spend extra Drive meter to initiate a crouching Parry * '''Perfect Parry''' ** Drive Gain when parrying multi-hit projectiles adjusted to prevent the defender from consuming more Drive meter than they spent ** Fixed an issue where inputting any upward direction after Perfect Parrying a projectile would buffer a jump input after the parry recovery ends ** Fixed an issue where after a jump normal was Perfect Parried, the timing to input an attack after landing was 1 frame later than usual * '''Attacks hitting backwards''' ** Many attacks could unintentionally hit opponents behind the player and have been adjusted to only hit in front * '''Assist Combos (Modern)''' ** Adjusted the timing that inputs are accepted and fixed buffer window issues ** Can no longer chain into a {{clr|L|Light}} normal while holding the Assist button (allows {{clr|L|Light Assist Combo}} to take priority)
== '''Key Character Changes''' == === '''Blanka''' === * {{clr|H|2HK}} ** Super Gain on Block decreased 600 → 500 (corrected to standard value) * {{clr|M|Rock Crusher}} ({{clr|M|6MP}}) ** Super Gain on Block decreased 250,250 → 125,125 (corrected to standard value) * {{clr|M|Double Knee Bombs}} ({{clr|M|6MK}}) ** Super Gain on Block decreased 250,250 → 125,125 (corrected to standard value) * {{clr|OD|OD Aerial Rolling Attack}} ({{clr|OD|j.[4]6PP}}) ** Super Gain on Block for the 1st hit decreased 650 → 450 (corrected to standard value) * {{clr|OD|OD Backstep Rolling Attack}} ({{clr|OD|63214KK}}) ** Increased opponent's Drive Gain on Parry 5000 → 10000 (1st attack) / 2500 → 5000 (2nd/3rd attacks) * '''Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind''' ** {{clr|H|5HK}}, {{clr|M|6MK}}, {{clr|OD|63214KK}} (1st hit), {{clr|L|[4]6LP}} (during {{clr|SA|SA2}}), {{clr|SA|SA3}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain''' ** {{clr|M|6MP}}, {{clr|M|6MK}}, {{clr|OD|63214KK}}
=== '''Cammy''' === * {{clr|M|Lift Uppercut}} ({{clr|M|4MP}}) ** Later active frames will no longer connect on crouch blocking opponents when timed meaty on the opponent's wakeup * {{clr|SA|SA2}} / {{clr|SA|Air SA2}} ({{clr|SA|214214P}} Ground/Air) ** Decreased the Drive Damage on a cinematic hit 11000 → 10000 ** Increased the Drive Damage on the final non-cinematic airborne hit 3000 → 3700 (can now match the cinematic version if all hits connect) * {{clr|SA|SA2}} / {{clr|SA|Air SA2}} / {{clr|SA|SA3/CA}} ** Fixed issue where a stunned opponent would recover from Burnout mid-combo if a {{clr|SA|Super}} connected while their Drive gauge was full * '''Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout''' ** {{clr|H|6HK}}, {{clr|H|5HP}}~{{clr|H|HK}}, 236P/{{clr|OD|PP}}~No Input, 236P/{{clr|OD|PP}}~2K * '''Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain''' ** 236{{clr|H|HK}}/{{clr|H|[HK]}}/{{clr|OD|KK}}, 236{{clr|H|[HK]}}/{{clr|OD|KK}}~No Input, 236{{clr|H|[HK]}}/{{clr|OD|KK}}~2K, {{clr|SA|SA1}}, {{clr|SA|SA2}}, {{clr|SA|Air SA2}}
=== '''Chun-Li''' === * {{clr|M|Assist Combo 2}} ** Fixed issue where after performing {{clr|SA|SA2}}, the next hit would not come out at if input at a specific timing * {{clr|H|j.HP}} ** Corrected the {{clr|PC|Counter-hit/Punish Counter}} damage vs. airborne opponents 960 → 600 (was using the damage value for grounded opponents) * {{clr|H|Lotus Punch}} (214P~{{clr|H|HP}}) ** Removed unintended invincibility on head hurtbox on frames 3-28 ** 2nd hit is now properly considered an overhead if the 1st hit whiffs * {{clr|OD|OD Tenko Kicks}} ({{clr|OD|22KK}}) ** Fixed issue where Chun-Li would move after landing if the opponent switched sides on the 2nd hit of the attack * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|236236P}}) ** Fixed issue where only the final hit could KO against an airborne opponent * {{clr|SA|SA3/CA}} ({{clr|SA|214214K}}) ** The distribution of the Drive Damage on Block has been adjusted ** {{clr|SA|SA3}}: 7500,0,0 → 6500,500,500 ** {{clr|SA|CA}}: 10000,0,0 → 9000,500,500 * '''Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind''' ** 236K/{{clr|OD|KK}}, {{clr|OD|236KK}}~{{clr|OD|KK}}, 214K/{{clr|OD|KK}}, [2]8K/{{clr|OD|KK}}, {{clr|SA|SA3}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Chip Damage vs. Burnout''' ** {{clr|M|[2]8MK}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout''' ** 214P~{{clr|H|HP}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain''' ** {{clr|H|2HP}}, 214P~{{clr|H|2HP}}, 236K/{{clr|OD|KK}}, {{clr|OD|236KK}}~{{clr|OD|KK}}, j.236K/{{clr|OD|KK}}, [2]8K/{{clr|OD|KK}}, {{clr|DR|Drive Reversal}}, {{clr|SA|SA1}}, {{clr|SA|Air SA1}}, {{clr|SA|SA2}}, {{clr|SA|SA3}}
=== '''Dee Jay''' === * Modern Controls ** Air Slasher shortcut ({{clr|DR|[4]S}}) will now only come out while still holding Back (4) or Up-Back (7) ** The short period where charge time is retained after letting go of the backward input no longer applies except when manually inputting Air Slasher ** This prevents overlap issues with Rolling Sobat and Jus Cool, as the Air Slasher would take priority for a short while after releasing charge * {{clr|L|Assist Combo 1}} ** Fixed issue where Dee Jay could not perform {{clr|L|5LK}} > {{clr|M|236MK}} by inputting it as A[{{clr|L|L}}] > {{clr|S|6S}} * {{clr|H|Assist Combo 3}} ** Fixed issue where the 3rd hit of the combo would have extra damage scaling if input late * Speedy Maracas (22P) ** Now in a {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} state when transitioned into from Air Slasher (to avoid confusion when punishing the projectile) ** Can no longer transition from Air Slasher into Speedy Maracas when the projectile hits as a {{clr|PC|Counter-hit/Punish Counter}}, is parried, or is absorbed by armor * {{clr|DR|Drive Reversal}} ** Updated the hurtbox to match the visuals more closely * '''Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind''' ** {{clr|L|5LK}}, 214P (1st hit), {{clr|SA|SA2}}, {{clr|SA|SA3}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Chip Damage vs. Burnout''' ** 214P/{{clr|OD|PP}}, {{clr|M|236MK}}, {{clr|H|236HK}}, {{clr|M|[2]8MK}}, {{clr|H|[2]8HK}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout''' ** 214K/{{clr|OD|KK}}~{{clr|L|LK}}, 214K/{{clr|OD|KK}}~{{clr|M|MK}}, * '''Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain''' ** {{clr|H|4HK}}, {{clr|H|236HK}}, {{clr|OD|236KK}}, {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|M|M}}/{{clr|H|H}} versions)
=== '''Dhalsim''' === * {{clr|M|5MK}} ** Super Gain on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} decreased 700 → 500 (corrected to standard value) * {{clr|M|j.MK}} ** Corrected the tip of the hitbox so that it must be blocked as an Overhead instead of both Low / High * {{clr|H|j.HP}} ** Fixed issue where opponents in Burnout did not incur 4 extra frames of blockstun * {{clr|H|HP Yoga Flame}} ({{clr|H|63214HP}}) ** Fixed issue where only 2 projectile clash hits would occur instead of 3 * Yoga Arch (236K) ** Fixed issue where Starter / Combo Scaling would be applied when the stationary hitbox connected (after the projectile hits the ground) * {{clr|OD|OD Yoga Comet}} ({{clr|OD|j.63214PP}}) ** Fixed issue where activating the move with plinked inputs (P~P) would prevent Dhalsim from using other airborne specials after recovery * Aerial Yoga Teleport (4 or 6 + j.PPP/j.KKK) ** Fixed issue where Dhalsim would gain Super gauge when activated ** Fixed issue where the PPP version would take 1 frame longer to land than the KKK version if nothing was input mid-air * {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|SA|214214K}}) ** Fixed issue where the projectile became invisible if only the final hit did not connect * '''Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain''' ** {{clr|OD|63214PP}}, {{clr|DR|Drive Reversal}}, {{clr|SA|SA1}}, {{clr|SA|SA2}}
=== '''E. Honda''' === * {{clr|H|5HP}} ** Fixed issue where {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} + Sumo Spirit enhancement traveled a much farther distance than usual * {{clr|H|2HP}} ** Fixed issue where {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} + Sumo Spirit enhancement traveled a much shorter distance than usual * '''Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout''' ** {{clr|H|6HK}}, {{clr|H|3HK}}, {{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|H|3HK}}, [2]8K/{{clr|OD|KK}} (2nd hit) * '''Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain''' ** 214P/{{clr|OD|PP}}, {{clr|OD|[4]6PP}}, 236K/{{clr|OD|KK}}~P, 236K/{{clr|OD|KK}}~2P, {{clr|SA|SA2}}, {{clr|SA|SA3}}
=== '''Guile''' === * {{clr|L|2LK}} ** Fixed issue where it could not be chain canceled when absorbed by armor * {{clr|M|Double Shot}} ({{clr|M|2MP}}~{{clr|M|2MP}}) ** Fixed issue where the extra Block Advantage vs. Burnout was +5 instead of +4 * {{clr|OD|OD Sonic Cross}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}) ** Decreased opponent's Drive Gain on Parry 5100 → 5000 * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|[4]646P}}) ** Decreased opponent's Drive Damage on Block 2520 → 2500 ** Fixed issue where {{clr|H|HP}} version's projectile clash did not match the visuals * {{clr|SA|SA3/CA}} ({{clr|SA|[4]646K}}) ** Fixed issue where a stunned opponent would recover from Burnout mid-combo if {{clr|SA|SA3/CA}} connected while their Drive gauge was full * '''Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain''' ** {{clr|OD|[2]8KK}}, {{clr|SA|SA1}}
=== '''Jamie''' === * Forward/Back Walk ** Fixed issue where Jamie would not move on the first frame during Drink Lv.4 * Tensei Kick (2KK) ** Fixed issue where startup was 1 frame slower while {{clr|SA|SA2 Install}} is active * {{clr|H|Ransui Haze Drink}} ({{clr|H|6HK}}~{{clr|H|4HK}}~P Far) ** Fixed issue where Jamie's damage scaling would not increase properly when the drink occurs after {{clr|SA|SA2 Install}} runs out * '''Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind''' ** {{clr|L|5LK}} (chained), {{clr|SA|SA1}}, {{clr|SA|SA3}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout''' ** {{clr|M|2MK}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain''' ** {{clr|H|5HP}}, {{clr|H|2HK}}, {{clr|H|6HK}}~{{clr|H|4HK}}~P (Close), 236P (DL4), 236K, {{clr|SA|SA1}}, {{clr|SA|SA3}}
=== '''JP''' === * {{clr|OD|OD Embrace}} ({{clr|OD|214KK}}) ** Fixed issue where JP could move freely if the throw connected at the same time he was hit by a projectile * {{clr|H|HP Stribog}} ({{clr|H|236HP}}, 1st hit) ** Fixed issue where JP would only gain half the usual amount of Drive Gauge on block when the opponent is in Burnout * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|236236P}}) ** When both hits are parried, Drive Gain on Parry distribution changed from 0,20000 → 10000,10000 * {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|SA|214214P}}) ** Fixed an issue where the final projectile would come out if JP was hit by an attack with short hitstun * {{clr|SA|SA3/CA}} ({{clr|SA|236236K}}) ** Fixed issue where a stunned opponent would recover from Burnout mid-combo if {{clr|SA|SA3/CA}} connected while their Drive gauge was full * '''Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind''' ** {{clr|L|5LK}}, 236P * '''Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout''' ** {{clr|M|236MK}}, {{clr|H|236HK}}, {{clr|SA|SA2}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain''' ** {{clr|H|6HK}}, {{clr|SA|SA1}}, {{clr|SA|SA2}}
=== '''Juri''' === * Modern Controls ** Fixed issue where performing {{clr|L|2L}} > {{clr|L|Assist Combo 1}} would result in a chained light normal during {{clr|SA|FSE}} ({{clr|SA|SA2 Install}}) * {{clr|H|Assist Combo 3}} ** Fixed issue where the transition from {{clr|OD|OD Ankensatsu}} to {{clr|OD|OD Go Ohsatsu}} would cost 2 Drive bars instead of 1 * {{clr|SA|FSE}} {{clr|M|6MK}} ** Fixed issue where Drive Gauge values were not scaled like other {{clr|SA|FSE}}-chained attacks ** Drive Gain on Hit 500 → 375 ** Drive Damage on Block 1250 → 625 ** Drive Damage on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} 2000 → 1250 * '''Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind''' ** {{clr|SA|SA2}} (initial hit) * '''Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain''' ** {{clr|M|5MK}}, {{clr|H|6HK}}, {{clr|H|4HK}}, 623P/{{clr|OD|PP}}, {{clr|H|236HK}} (1-stock), {{clr|OD|236}}{{clr|M|MK}}{{clr|H|HK}}, {{clr|SA|SA1}}
=== '''Ken''' === * {{clr|DR|Drive Reversal}} ** Fixed issue where Ken's invincibility lasted longer on hit than other characters * Run~Shoryuken (KK~623P) ** Super Gain on Block decreased 300 → 200 for the 1st/2nd hits (corrected to standard value) * {{clr|OD|OD Hadoken}} ({{clr|OD|236PP}}) ** Drive Damage on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} adjusted 5000,0 → 2500,2500 * '''Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind''' ** KK~{{clr|H|HK}}, KK~214K (forward hitboxes), 236K/{{clr|OD|KK}}, {{clr|M|214MK}}, {{clr|H|214HK}}, 623K * '''Universal Adjustments - Chip Damage vs. Burnout''' ** {{clr|L|623LK}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout''' ** KK~{{clr|M|MK}}, 236K/{{clr|OD|KK}}~{{clr|L|6LK}}, 236K/{{clr|OD|KK}}~{{clr|M|6MK}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain''' ** 623{{clr|M|MP}}/{{clr|H|HP}}/{{clr|OD|PP}}, KK~623P, 214{{clr|M|MK}}/{{clr|H|HK}}/{{clr|OD|KK}}, KK~214K, {{clr|SA|SA2}}, {{clr|SA|SA3}}
=== '''Kimberly''' === * {{clr|M|Bushin Prism Strikes 1}} ({{clr|L|5LP}}~{{clr|M|MP}}) ** Super Gain on Block increased 150 → 200 (corrected to standard value) * {{clr|M|MP}}/{{clr|H|HP}}/{{clr|OD|OD}} Vagabond Edge (236{{clr|M|MP}}/{{clr|H|HP}}/{{clr|OD|PP}}) ** Corrected the Drive Damage on Block 2000 → 4000 * {{clr|SA|Super Arts}} (all) ** Fixed issue where a stunned opponent would recover from Burnout mid-combo if a {{clr|SA|Super}} connected while their Drive gauge was full * '''Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout''' ** 236K/{{clr|OD|KK}}~{{clr|M|MK}}, 236K/{{clr|OD|KK}}~{{clr|H|HK}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain''' ** j.214K/{{clr|OD|KK}}, 236K/{{clr|OD|KK}} (Close), {{clr|OD|236KK}}~{{clr|L|LK}}, {{clr|OD|236KK}}~{{clr|M|MK}}, {{clr|OD|236KK}}~{{clr|H|HK}}
=== '''Lily''' === * Prejump Frames ** Fixed issue where Lily could cancel prejump frames into special moves 1 frame longer than intended (except for 360+P command throws) * {{clr|SA|SA2}} / {{clr|SA|Air SA2}} ({{clr|SA|236236K}} / {{clr|SA|j.236236K}}) ** Increased the Drive Gain on Parry for the {{clr|WC|Windclad}} versions to match the regular versions ** Expanded a combo-only hitbox upward for juggle consistency * '''Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout''' ** {{clr|H|j.2HP}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain''' ** {{clr|H|2HP}}, {{clr|H|2HK}}, {{clr|OD|623PP}}, {{clr|WC|W.}}623P/{{clr|OD|PP}}, {{clr|OD|j.PPP}}, {{clr|WC|W.}}j.PP/{{clr|OD|PPP}}, {{clr|SA|SA1}}, {{clr|SA|SA2}}, {{clr|SA|Air SA2}}
=== '''Luke''' === * {{clr|OD|OD No Chaser}} ({{clr|OD|236KK~P}}) ** Super Gain on Block increased 500 → 600 (corrected to standard value) * {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} ** Fixed issue that would cause the opponent to take no damage when being hit in certain circumstances * '''Universal Adjustments - Chip Damage vs. Burnout''' ** {{clr|L|pf.214[LP]}} (2nd hit) * '''Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout''' ** {{clr|L|pf.214[LP]}} (2nd hit), {{clr|OD|236PP}}~{{clr|OD|PP}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain''' ** 214[P] (Perfect/non-Perfect), {{clr|OD|623PP}}, {{clr|SA|SA1}}, {{clr|SA|SA2}}
=== '''Manon''' === * {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} ** Fixed issue where {{clr|DR|DI Clash}} would occur even if activated 1 frame later than the opponent * Rond-point (236K) ** {{clr|H|HK}} version 2nd hit {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} damage corrected 600 → 480 ** {{clr|H|HK}}/{{clr|OD|OD}} version 2nd hit recovery no longer cancelable early on block * {{clr|OD|OD Renversé}} ({{clr|OD|236PP}}) ** Fixed issue where recovery was 1 frame slower at Medal Lv.3 or Lv.4 * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|236236K}}) ** Fixed issue where Manon could pass through some moves while both are active * '''Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind''' ** {{clr|L|5LK}}, {{clr|SA|SA3}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout''' ** {{clr|SA|SA1}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain''' ** {{clr|L|214LK}}, {{clr|M|214MK}}, 236K, {{clr|SA|SA2}}
=== '''Marisa''' === * Modern Controls ** Fixed issue where normals could not be canceled into Gladius using {{clr|DR|6S}} input ** {{clr|DR|6S}} is normally Scutum (214K) which cannot be canceled into from normals, so the {{clr|DR|6S}} acts like a {{clr|DR|5S}} in this context * {{clr|H|Caelum Arc}} ({{clr|H|nj.2HP}}) ** Fixed issue where the recovery was much longer if it connected as a cross-up; Hit Recovery 27 → 19; Block Recovery 23 → 15 ** Fixed issue where the opponent would turn the wrong way if blocked cross-up during Burnout ** Fixed issue where the landing recovery could be canceled into with another move * Dimachaerus (214P) ** Fixed issue where Super Gain on Block was not half of the standard Hit value * {{clr|SA|Held SA1}} ({{clr|SA|236236[P]}}) ** Fixed issue where the damage increased on {{clr|PC|Counter-hit/Punish Counter}} on active frames 5-6 * '''Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind''' ** 236P, 623P, 236K * '''Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout''' ** {{clr|H|2HK}}, {{clr|H|2[HK]}}, {{clr|H|j.[HP]}}, {{clr|H|j.[HK]}}, {{clr|H|nj.2[HP]}}, {{clr|M|6MP}}~{{clr|H|HP}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain''' ** {{clr|SA|SA2}}
=== '''Rashid''' === * Forward Dash ** Adjusted the beginning of the animation to be more visually apparent ** Fixed issue where the total dash duration would change depending on how the move was input ** Fixed issue where Rashid could not input a Throw Escape after the dash recovery frames had ended * Air Throw ({{clr|L|j.LPLK}}) ** Drive Gain on Hit increased 1600 → 2000 * Enhanced Tempest Moon (6[6]~6K Air) ** Drive Gain on Parry adjusted 10000,5000,5000 → 5000,2500,2500 ** Previously would build 2 bars for the opponent instead of the standard 1 bar * {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} ** Fixed issue that would cause the opponent to take no damage when being hit in certain circumstances * {{clr|L|Enhanced LP Spinning Mixer}} ({{clr|L|236LP}} Air) ** Drive Gain on Block adjusted 2000 → 900 to match the value on Hit * {{clr|M|Enhanced MP Spinning Mixer}} ({{clr|M|236MP}} Air) ** Damage on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} corrected to the standard +20% bonus: 2880 (360x2,240x8,240) → 1680 (240x2,120x8,240) ** Drive Gain on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} corrected to match the value on Hit: 0x2,200x8,200 → 150x10,500 * {{clr|OD|Enhanced OD Spinning Mixer}} ({{clr|OD|236PP}} Air) ** Damage on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} corrected to the standard +20% bonus: 2880 (360x2,240x8,240) → 1680 (240x2,120x8,240) ** Super Gain on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} for 3rd hit adjusted 100 → 50 (corrected to standard value) ** Drive Gain on Parry 12000 → 10000 ** Fixed issue where Rashid would gain Drive meter on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} from the 4th hit onward * {{clr|OD|Enhanced OD Eagle Spike}} ({{clr|OD|214KK}} Air) ** Fixed issue where Rashid would whiff through a grounded character if {{clr|SA|SA2}} was placed behind the opponent * {{clr|OD|OD Arabian Skyhigh}} ({{clr|OD|j.214KK}}) ** Fixed issue where Rashid would gain Drive meter when blocked * '''Super Gain on Block''' (corrected to be 1/2 the standard value on Hit) ** {{clr|M|6MP}}, 6[6]~6K, Enhanced 236{{clr|L|LP}}/{{clr|H|HP}}, {{clr|M|Enhanced 236MP}} (vs. stand block), 214{{clr|M|MK}}/{{clr|H|HK}}, {{clr|OD|214KK}} (vs. Burnout), Enhanced 214{{clr|M|MK}}/{{clr|H|HK}}, 214P, 214P/{{clr|OD|PP}}~6K~K, j.214K/{{clr|OD|KK}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Chip Damage vs. Burnout''' ** {{clr|H|Enhanced 236HP}}, {{clr|OD|Enhanced 236PP}}, {{clr|M|236[MK]}} (1st hit), {{clr|OD|214PP}}, 214P/{{clr|OD|PP}}~6K~K, j.214K * '''Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain''' ** {{clr|H|j.HP}}, {{clr|M|6MP}}, 6[6]~6K, 236{{clr|L|LP}}/{{clr|M|MP}}/{{clr|OD|PP}}, 214P/{{clr|OD|PP}}, {{clr|SA|SA2}}
=== '''Ryu''' === * {{clr|H|2HP}} ** Fixed issue where Ryu would move backwards if the 2nd active frame connected on hit * {{clr|H|Fuwa Triple Strike}} ({{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|L|LK}}~{{clr|H|HK}}) ** Fixed issue where 2nd hit would increase the opponent's Drive gauge on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}}; now decreases it by 2000 instead ** 3rd hit Drive Damage on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} increased 0 → 10000 * {{clr|H|High Double Strike}} ({{clr|H|5HP}}~{{clr|H|HK}}) ** 2nd hit Drive Damage on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} increased 0 → 10000 * {{clr|SA|SA2 Lv.2/3}} ({{clr|SA|214214[P]}}) ** Hitbox expanded inwards; collision box expanded upwards from button release until the end of active frames ** Only applies mid-combo to prevent the attack from whiffing under an opponent * '''Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind''' ** {{clr|L|5LK}}, {{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|L|LK}}, {{clr|SA|SA3}} (final hit) * '''Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout''' ** {{clr|M|j.MP}} (2nd hit), {{clr|M|6MP}} (2nd hit) * '''Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain''' ** {{clr|M|j.MP}}, {{clr|M|6MP}}, {{clr|H|6HP}}, {{clr|H|4HK}}, {{clr|OD|623P}}, 214{{clr|M|MK}}/{{clr|H|HK}}/{{clr|OD|KK}}, {{clr|SA|SA1}}, {{clr|SA|SA3}}
=== '''Zangief''' === * {{clr|H|Smetana Dropkick}} ({{clr|H|3HK}}) ** Drive Damage on Block increased 3000 → 6000 * Borscht Dynamite (j.360+K) ** Input Recognition Time: 20f → 12f (less likely to come out accidentally mid-air) ** Super Gain on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} increased by 150 (corrected to match the standard value) * {{clr|OD|OD Double Lariat}} ({{clr|OD|PPP}}) ** Super Gain on Hit decreased 300 → 250 (2nd hit onward) * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|236236K}}) ** Fixed issue where Drive Damage on Hit was 60 less when input with Modern shortcut ** Fixed issue where a stunned opponent would recover from Burnout mid-combo if {{clr|SA|SA1}} connected while their Drive gauge was full * {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|SA|236236P}}) ** 2nd hit onward: expanded the collision box and hitboxes vertically on a successful hit to prevent a juggle from dropping ** Fixed issue where the suction effect would persist when interrupted on startup * '''Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind''' ** {{clr|L|5LK}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout''' ** {{clr|M|2MK}}, {{clr|H|3HK}} * '''Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain''' ** PP/{{clr|OD|PPP}}, {{clr|SA|SA2}}
